name: Aleph Alpha
description: Registers Aleph Alpha Pharia chat models as a first-party provider using ALEPH_ALPHA_API_KEY or a Plugin Setting.

env.description: Fallback Aleph Alpha API key used for Pharia inference and model discovery when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Aleph Alpha API key
settings.description: Aleph Alpha API key used for Pharia inference and model discovery. Falls back to ALEPH_ALPHA_API_KEY.

providers.name: Aleph Alpha Pharia
providers.description: Discovers Aleph Alpha model settings and runs chat-capable Pharia models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
